reasoning: The control IA-5(5) focuses on authenticator management, specifically changing authenticators prior to delivery. This is primarily related to password policies and management, which are typically handled by identity providers or cloud IAM services. Kubernetes itself does not manage user passwords or similar authenticators directly; it relies on external identity providers for authentication (e.g., OIDC, LDAP). Therefore, there is no direct equivalent control within Kubernetes for managing password policies or ensuring password changes prior to delivery.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | change authenticators prior to delivery require devel
